_comment: cli-ready-alerts config. Copied to config.json on first setup.sh run. Hot-reloadable (dispatch reads on every hook fire). See README for how to add contexts.
_sound_mode_note: sounds = use macOS system sounds below | talking = use macOS say (no files needed) | drop <context>_<event>.mp3 in sounds/ to override either mode

talking._note: Active when sound_mode=talking. Voice must be installed (run: say -v ? | grep en_ to list options).

telegram._note: phase 7 — requires env vars set in $TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN / $TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID
